Document:
# Precursor Purchases This guide will explain how to use precursor to purchase rare items. Only members of a Rogue Network will be able to use precursor to do purchases.
## Rogue Levels As you earn precursor you gain experience towards higher Rogue Levels. More powerful and rare items are locked behind higher Rogue Levels. If your secret phrase is compromised you will be cast out of your Rogue Network and be reset to the lowest Rogue Level.
## Making a Purchase In order to make a purchase through the Purchases tab you must be nearby a cargo telepad.
